headline: Philip Morris International (PM) Is Up 6.3% After FDA Grants ZYN Modified Risk Status - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Earlier this week, Philip Morris International announced that the U.S. FDA had authorized commercialization of its ZYN smoke-free nicotine pouches as modified risk tobacco products, recognizing that switching completely from cigarettes to ZYN reduces exposure to harmful chemicals linked to major smoking-related diseases. This decision makes ZYN the first and only nicotine pouch brand with modified risk status in the U.S., giving Philip Morris a distinct regulatory and scientific edge in the...

headline: Is Philip Morris International (PM) Fully Valued On ZYN FDA Authorization?
summary: Philip Morris International (PM) is back in focus after the U.S. Food and Drug Administration authorized its ZYN smoke free nicotine pouches as modified risk tobacco products, marking the first such authorization for the nicotine pouch category. See our latest analysis for Philip Morris International. Philip Morris International’s recent FDA milestone comes on top of strong share price momentum, with a 22.30% 90 day share price return and a 147.74% five year total shareholder return,...
